issues.detail: Some method names like with_effects are not standard MoviePy, causing ambiguity for users unfamiliar with the agent's custom wrappers.
The instructions lack error handling guidance for missing files, ffmpeg installation failures, or unsupported formats.
Installation steps assume a Debian-based Linux environment, limiting applicability on Windows or macOS.

scenarios.name: Composite a 1920x1080 colored background, a centered main video resized to height 800, and a top-right logo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses MoviePy 1.x methods like resize() and set_position() that fail in 2.x, while treatment uses ColorClip with size and color, .resized(height=800), .with_position("center"), .with_position((1820, 30)), and CompositeVideoClip([...], size=(1920,1080)) as documented for 2.x.

scenarios.name: Add a fade-in/fade-out title text overlay to a video with MoviePy 2.x
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for v1 method names (set_duration, set_position) which break, while treatment uses TextClip(text=, font_size=, color=, stroke_color=) chained with .with_duration(), .with_position(), .with_start(), .crossfadein()/.crossfadeout() and CompositeVideoClip as documented.
